Class AppSettings

Sannel.Encoding.Manager.Web.Features.Settings.Entities

Sannel.Encoding.Manager.Data.dll

Singleton application settings row — always stored with Id = 1.

Properties

AudioDefault

Default audio codec: "Opus" or "Aac".

public string AudioDefault { get; set; }

Property Value

string

AudioLanguages

Comma-separated ISO 639-2 audio language codes (e.g. "eng,jpn").

public string AudioLanguages { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Id 

public int Id { get; set; }

Property Value

int

SubtitleLanguages

Comma-separated ISO 639-2 subtitle language codes (e.g. "eng").

public string SubtitleLanguages { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TrackDestinationRoot

The label of the configured filesystem root to use as the base output directory. Matches a label from FilesystemOptions.Roots.

public string? TrackDestinationRoot { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TrackDestinationTemplate

Output file path template. Supported variables: {SourceDisk}, {TVDBShow}, {TVDBID}, {SeasonNumber}, {EpisodeName}.

{SeasonNumber} expands to "Season 01" / "Season 12". {EpisodeName} expands to "s01e05 - Title.mkv"; omits season/episode when unknown; falls back to "Title {N} Ch {start}-{end}" when no episode title.

public string TrackDestinationTemplate { get; set; }

Property Value

string
